Home / Check a message

AI scam checker

Paste a suspicious message, email, URL, or job offer below and get an instant plain-English verdict powered by Claude AI.

0 / 3000

Your message is sent to Claude AI for analysis and is not stored by Beat the Scam. Do not include passwords or full bank account numbers.

Analysing…

This tool provides educational guidance only. It is not a definitive fraud verdict. If you have already sent money or shared personal details, contact your bank immediately and report to Action Fraud.

Beat the Scam

Scam alerts, plain-English checks, and practical guides to help people verify suspicious emails, texts, websites, calls, and offers.

Educational content only. Not legal, regulatory, or financial advice.
